programme.title: Wagners Jews
programme.desc: Richard Wagner was notoriously anti-Semitic, and his writings on Jews were later embraced by Hitler and the Nazis. But for years, many of Wagner‘s closest associates were Jews - young musicians who became personally devoted to him, and provided crucial help to his work and career. Why were they drawn to him? And how could Wagner even accept their embrace? These questions are at the heart of ‘Wagner‘s Jews’, the first film to focus on Wagner‘s complex personal relationships with Jews. Filmed on location in Germany, Switzerland, and Italy, ‘Wagner‘s Jews’ reveals this remarkable story through archival sources, re-enactments, interviews, and performances of original musical works by Wagner‘s Jewish colleagues. Featuring Zubin Mehta and Leon Botstein among others, the film also explores the ongoing controversy over performing Wagner‘s music in Israel. The same questions asked in Wagner‘s time still resonate today: is it possible to separate the art from its creator? Can sublime music transcend prejudice and bigotry, and the weight of history?Subtitles available for this program with your remote controlSubtítulos disponibles para este programa con su control remoto.

programme.title: Yehudi Menuhin, the Violin of the Century
programme.desc: Lord Yehudi Menuhin, relaxing at his home in the Greek isles, tells the story of his wonderful career on the eve of his 80th birthday. A wealth of rare archival material illustrates this highly informative and entertaining profile of the worlds greatest violinist, providing insight into the life of the young San Franciscan wonderchild, his sudden rise to stardom which led to an outstanding international career, his encounters with the worlds greatest musicians and music traditions, and his involvement in world politics.Subtitles available for this program with your remote control.

programme.title: Bruno Walter . Portrait
programme.desc: The film portrays Bruno Walter (1876-1962), one of the most important conductors of the 20th century. The Italian biographer Michele Selvini speaks about the musician Bruno Walter who formed the musical life of the capitals of Europe and the United States over a period of 60 years. But so far not published film material also shows a different, not so known Bruno Walter as a private man.

programme.desc: Tyreme traffade den vackra Tomorrow på natet for nio månader sen. De har kommit varandra nara och Tyreme ar redo att flytta for att få vara med henne. Kommer Max och Nev att kunna hjalpa Tyreme att få traffa sin morgondag?

programme.title: Love and Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Alla ar skakade efter bråket mellan Spice och Erica Mena. Ericas minnesbild ifrågasatts och det uppstår splittring mellan vanner. Kirk overraskar Rasheeda och ganget med ett Bahamasaventyr!

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Neko har varit van med Kara i 10 år, så nar de borjade dejta for ett år sen litade han på henne. Ända sen Kara borjade som strippa och frisor har Neko funderat på om hon gått over granser med sina valbestallda kunder.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.sub-title: Så mycket paj kan han inte ata
programme.desc: Tracy trodde sig ha hittat sin sjalsfrande i musikproducenten McKinley. Men två år senare låter det annorlunda, och hon misstanker att han ar otrogen.

programme.title: All Star Shore
programme.sub-title: Id Rather be a Worm Than a Rat
programme.desc: Melinda och Xavi vill anvanda beloningen for att sanka sina rivaler. I ett tequiladrankt Exilspel drar sig ett lag ur. Vinny och Tamaris ordnar familjemiddag dar alla avslojar vad de egentligen tycker om varandra.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness utforskar Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim och Lolo Wood eld i sportvarlden i Flamsport, får reda på hur farliga dorrar kan vara i Skruven ar los och blir overraskade av Ovantade raketer.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness krockar Rob, Steelo och Lolo Wood med stillastående objekt i Parkerad smarta, upptacker att trafiken ibland ar bisarr i Motorvagsstopp och upplever faran med Vildsinta tjurar.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness stoter Rob, Steelo och Lolo Wood på farliga voltare i Voltmedvetenhet, kanner smartan nar en cykel pajar i Billiga cyklar och upptacker att hissar och sprit inte passar så bra ihop i Hiss-packade.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness forsoker Rob, Steelo och Lolo Wood att muntra upp folk i Vinterdepp, tar reda på vad som hander i Ansikte mot stangsel, och sabbar perfekta ogonblick med Sorgliga forlovningsfilmer.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK
programme.desc: Chloe firar sin drombabyshower. Sassi jobbar på sin framtid. Amber moter en gammal fiende. Mia forsoker forsonas med Maggie.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Vissa studior tappar fattningen nar de blir osams over en jaktig elimineringstatuering. Kampen om 200 000 dollar och titeln Master Shop blir allt intensivare.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Studior faller for pressen nar spanningen mellan lagkamraterna trappas upp. Kampen om 200 000 dollar och den forsta Master Shop-titeln någonsin fortsatter.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I detta nya avsnitt av Ridiculousness upptacker Rob, Chanel och Steelo hur svårt det ar att måla i Ommålning, traffar kampande par i Par i bråk och upptacker att inte alla gillar skoj i Vill inte vara har.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness forsoker Rob, Chanel och Steelo ta over ratten från den som ar Fodd till passagerare, blir frustrerade over Toxiska vanner och går in for att undkomma aggressiva Måsmaffian.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness Rob kampar Chanel och Steelo mot extremvader i Nej, se det haglar, bevittnar enorma vattenlackor i Trasiga ror och har lite kul på jobbet med Kontorsprank.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness har Rob, Chanel och Steelo pengar på hjarnan i Pengaprat, gor saker de ångrar i Berusade beslut och kollar in vyn ovanfor i Hoga ogon.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness traffar Rob, Chanel och Steelo några stokiga staderskor i Dåliga stadare, bevittnar katastrofala popcorn-olyckor i Korn som brinner och oppnar ogonen i Uppsparrade ogon.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt Ridiculousness ska Rob, Chanel och Steelo få se folk få vad de fortjanar i Långfingerkarma, bli besvarade av Laskiga komplimanger och se framtidens halsningar i Extrema handslag.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Repute pour etre le createur de la peinture à l’huile, le peintre flamand Jan van Eyck (1390-1441) est un artiste majeur du 15ème siècle. Il est considere comme etant le fondateur du portrait occidental qu’il a pratique très meticuleusement. Regardez de près la fameux « Portrait d’Arnolfini » expose à la Galerie Nationale de Londres, le miroir circulaire au fond de la pièce montre le reflet de l’artiste. « La vierge du chancelier Rolin » expose au Louvre, quant à elle montre une image dans laquelle trois arcs s’ouvrent sur un paysage fluvial.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Edgar Degas.You will discover his labour with Portrait of hilaire rene Degas, race horses, ballet rehearsal on the set.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Netherland painter, Vincent van Gogh.You will discover his labour with Self-portrait, Memory of the garden at Etten, Van Gogh’s chair.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Lhôtel Van Eetvelde, une maison particulière de trois etages, construite entre 1895 et 1897, à Bruxelles, Avenue Palmerston. Lhomme qui la fait construire: Edmond Van Eetvelde, un haut fonctionnaire dont la carrière est en pleine ascension. Pour construire sa maison, Van Eetvelde choisit Victor Horta, un jeune archi-tecte davant garde, lun des createurs du mouvement de lart nouveau.

programme.title: The Grand Palais Metamorphosis
programme.desc: The Grand Palais is currently undergoing the most extensive renovation in its history. The film, directed by Stefan Cornic, tells the story of the current and past renovation projects.

programme.title: Let me capture your world
programme.desc: Nicolas Henry decide de retourner en Inde et de se plonger dans un des mythes de l’Inde : celui des Maharadjahs. Qui sont aujourd’hui les descendants de ces anciens souverains ? Sa quete photographique l’amènera à rencontrer 3 familles d’anciens Maharadjahs. Invite dans les forts ancestraux où ces familles vivent encore, il cherchera à decouvrir leur realite contemporaine. Nicolas creera avec eux ses mises en scène pour raconter leur histoire passee et leur vie d’aujourd’hui.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Lhôtel Van Eetvelde, une maison particulière de trois etages, construite entre 1895 et 1897, à Bruxelles, Avenue Palmerston. Lhomme qui la fait construire: Edmond Van Eetvelde, un haut fonctionnaire dont la carrière est en pleine ascension. Pour construire sa maison, Van Eetvelde choisit Victor Horta, un jeune archi-tecte davant garde, lun des createurs du mouvement de lart nouveau.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Bertrand Ohl, team leader at Art France, a company specialized in packing and transporting artworks. For the past few weeks he has been busy emptying the rooms of the Lorrain Museum in Nancy, which is about to undergo renovations. It is a meticulous program that must be done quickly. We will accompany him to discover his very particular work.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: From the first Buddhas found in Afghanistan to the mysterious treasures of Angkor, from the most beautiful Japanese prints to the fine arts of Chinese ceramics, the National Museum of Asian Arts - Guimet offers as many possibilities as possible of course meditative, aesthetic, or exploratory at the heart of Asian history. True to wish of its founder Emile Guimet, the museum brings together today the largest collection of Asian art in Europe.

programme.title: Street Art - They Own the Day
programme.desc: From “simple” tags to gigantic, colorful murals and collages, street art that was once suppressed is now officially open to the eye of the beholder. When did this shift take place?

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: En 1897, Sir Henry Tate, industriel et collectionneur d’art, offrît sa collection privee à la nation britannique et finança la construction de la Tate Gallery pour abriter celle-ci. Rebaptise « Tate Britain » en 2000, le musee se consacre à l’art britannique. Retrouvez les chefs d’œuvres les plus celèbres de cette institution prestigieuse, tels que le Newton de William Blake, La dame de Shalott de John William Waterhouse ou La mort de Chatterton de Henry Wallis. Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Originaire de la ville de Grasse dans le sud de la France, Jean-Honore Fragonard est le peintre français le plus emblematique du 18ème siècle. Il a etudie à l’academie française à Rome mais à choisi de devenir libre dans son travail, preferant effectuer des commissions privees, dont certaines ont eu du succès comme « La chemise enlevee » expose au Louvre. « Fanciful Figure » expose au Louvre-Lens quant à elle demontre un style très moderne et original. L’un de ses chefs-d’oeuvre est sans aucun doute le tableau « Le Boulon », appartenant aujourd’hui à la collection du Louvre à Paris.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Russian painter, Vassily Kandinsky. You will discover his labour with Old city n°2, Park of Saint-cloud, Rider (improvisation n°12).

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Jean-Honore Fragonard.You will discover his labour with Psyche showing her sisters her gifts from cupid, The storm, Night scene or the Beggar’s dream.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Situe près de Compiègne, le château de Pierrefonds est un des plus puissants châteaux de Jean de Berry, demantele et eventre sur ordre de Richelieu au XVIIe siècle, une des plus belles ruines medievales, capable de suggerer tant de nostalgies romantiques au XIXe. Une ruine achetee par Napoleon III pour en faire restaurer une partie, et la transformer en demeure imperiale...

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: The National Assembly, the Thiers Library or the Custodia Foundation, when you think of these important places in the history of France, you dont think that they can contain real treasures. We will prove you are wrong! Experts, historians, will guide us and make us discover the secrets of these incredible places.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Bertrand Ohl, team leader at Art France, a company specialized in packing and transporting artworks. For the past few weeks he has been busy emptying the rooms of the Lorrain Museum in Nancy, which is about to undergo renovations. It is a meticulous program that must be done quickly. We will accompany him to discover his very particular work.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: From the first Buddhas found in Afghanistan to the mysterious treasures of Angkor, from the most beautiful Japanese prints to the fine arts of Chinese ceramics, the National Museum of Asian Arts - Guimet offers as many possibilities as possible of course meditative, aesthetic, or exploratory at the heart of Asian history. True to wish of its founder Emile Guimet, the museum brings together today the largest collection of Asian art in Europe.

programme.title: The Grand Palais Metamorphosis
programme.desc: The Grand Palais is currently undergoing the most extensive renovation in its history. The film, directed by Stefan Cornic, tells the story of the current and past renovation projects.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The National Gallery in London is one of the world’s greatest art galleries. It is brimming with masterpieces, an inexhaustible treasure trove of history and an endless source of stories. This film gives a voice to those whose lives have been touched by the Gallery, from the security guard to the director, including daily visitors, celebrities and members of the royal family. Claudia Winkleman, Michael Palin, Terry Gilliam, Jacqueline Wilson and Her Royal Highness Princess Eugenie reveal their deeply personal connection to the National Gallery.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Joseph Mallord William Turner fut l’un des plus grands paysagistes du XIXe siècle. Singulier et avant-gardiste, il a su cree un art très personnel, qui lui a valu le surnom de « peintre de la lumière », tant il frôlait la perfection dans lart devoquer une atmosphère. Cette exposition vous permettra de decouvrir ses celèbres marines et ses vues venitiennes ou anglaises mais, avec La supplique de lecrivain pauvre, vous verrez aussi que Turner n’etait pas seulement un brillant paysagiste… Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Dans la seconde moitie du 19ème siècle, Edouard Manet (1832-1883) demontre une grande originalite dans ses peintures à representation historique et ses portraits representant des figures connues, comme le romancier Zola et le poète Mallarme. Meme s’il n’est pas reconnu comme etant le premier impressionniste, sa place de leader dans l’histoire de l’art se doit d’etre souligne. Les scandales provoques en 1863 par « Le Dejeuner sur l’herbe » ou « Olympia » tout deux exposes au Musee dOrsay marque le debut de la peinture moderne.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Le street Art s’est, depuis les annees 1980, glisse dans les villes et ses artistes s’octroient une place grandissante dans l’espace urbain, mais aussi dans les collections d’art. Installe à Lille, Jef Aerosol fait partie des historiques du Street Art français avec option pochoir. Son genre, c’est le portrait, et il a longtemps puise dans l’univers musical pour decliner sa passion. L’artiste est collectionne aujourd’hui par les plus grands amateurs de Street Art.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Edouard Manet.You will discover his labour with Lola de valence, Olympia, Eel and red mullet.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Paul Cezanne. You will discover his labour with his still-life, mill on the Couleuvre at Pontoise, Young girl with doll.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine des pois chiches. Comme ils sont originaires du Moyen-Orient, elle decide de preparer des recettes libanaises. Au menu : fallafels avec des pois chiches, du kumquat, des epices, de la cannelle, et blettes aux pois chiches, persil, menthe et boulgour.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo met la Normandie à lhonneur ! Avec le president de la region, Herve Morin, elle prepare des pommes pochees dans un sirop de cannelle, ainsi que des moules... à sa façon.

programme.title: Big Little Footprints
programme.desc: To educate our children about the profound impact of travel we travel to Miami, Florida. Well learn about the areas colorful history, taste test its cuisine, learn Latin dancing and experience an epic adventure through the everglades - if we can make it out of alligator infested waters first!

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: Andean cultures produce foods adapted to high altitudes, such as royal quinoa. With a Bolivian chef, we prepare dishes that celebrate nutrition, culture, and community. In Bolivia, eating is a celebration of the land and its gifts.

programme.desc: In this episode we remind viewers just how much you can find when exploring your own backyard by road tripping the California Coast to Santa Barbara! Swapping TV time to chats around the campfire and an exciting encounter with sea lions.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: To better understand the role of these explosive mountains located all over the world, on land or under the sea, Yann Arthus-Bertrand goes to Italy, the country with the most active volcanoes in Europe. Accompanied by volcano expert Jacques-Marie Bardintzeff, the photographer meets those people who have chosen to live with « their » volcano, in spite of the dangers involved in this kind of proximity.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" focuses on a muscle strengthening and mobility session, carefully designed to relax and energize the body. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a full warm-up, emphasizing movements for the neck, shoulders, and chest to release tension. Each exercise aims to improve movement range and posture, fostering a connection between the brain and body to prevent injuries. Through progressive rotations and stretches, the session stimulates joint mobility, especially in the knees and ankles. This comprehensive and nurturing approach is ideal for reconnecting with oneself while gently strengthening the body.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Prana Flow: Open Your Shoulders and Hips
programme.desc: This vinyasa flow allows the practitioner to notice moments of stillness and transformation with every breath. Power and Prana calls for a constant presence of mind and steadiness of breath. It is in this state you learn when to stabilize and when to let go.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to an intense and motivating cardio session. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a full warm-up, emphasizing the importance of preparing the body for an energetic workout. The program includes two standing movement exercises, followed by two on the floor, each performed in four sets of 40 seconds. The goal is to raise the heart rate and strengthen the muscles by alternating between intense efforts and floor exercises. The friendly and fun atmosphere makes this session perfect for training in a great mood while pushing your limits.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: For the third day of competition, Nancy is in the starting blocks. The 50-year-old mother of seven hails from Canada. And when it comes to decorating, this Seneffe resident is not short of practice. The proof: Nancy runs an old post office as a guest house, which she has completely redecorated.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: The competition continues with Eric. At 49, this well-groomed Parisian describes himself as an original, but not only that. At least the competitors have been warned. For Eric, decorating is a real passion.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today sees the long-awaited verdict. Our budding decorators will finally find out what theyve scored, and what the owners think of their new interior. Who will score the most points? Who of Melissa, Françoise, Eric or Nancy will win the title of Deco Master?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Direction le Loir-et-Cher pour une chasse à courre encadree par les equipes de l’ONCFS. Prenons ensuite la route des Vosges pour cuisiner aux côtes de Mauricette une savoureuse gigue de cerf. Allons à la rencontre de Pierre en Côte d’Or où il fabrique des trompes de chasse, un outil indispensable à la venerie. Julie retrouvera aussi deux chasseurs girondins pour une après-midi de chasse à la tonne dès plus originale avant de rejoindre Joël en Aquitaine pour une autre recette de gibier à plume. Nous parlerons ensuite avec Laurent du metier de piqueux : ce dresseur de chiens destines à la venerie. Cette fois-ci ce sera Frederic Robert qui nous concoctera une recette de lièvre frotte au cacao et cuit dans un sarcophage d’argile.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, lets discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is a mushroom that we are going to focus on today. A mushroom, or a black diamond, some would say: the truffle.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas etre deçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Decouvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits preferes des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au meme titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Cote recettes, Julie fera decouvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous reserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien etre.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... Well cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. Well then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, well discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is in the heart of the Sarthe that Julie begins her new tour. Located in the Pays de la Loire region, the Sarthe department is the gateway to the French Grand Ouest. In the Haut Maine region, Le Mans is a city of art as well as a historic city, which played a decisive role in the development of the automobile. The country of Le Mans is distinguished by the diversity of its heritage, having kept in its stones the imprints of all eras. This region is notably renowned for its poulet de Loue, its capon and many other regional specialities. Lets go for a real Sarthe gourmet journey, with veal rouelles à la mancelle, roast poularde and seasonal fruit tart.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpente le pays de Blaye, visite deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arreter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour decouvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelee « Cite du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour decouvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus recents de cette ville chargee d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Avec son amie Myriam, Luana Belmondo prepare deux recettes à base de safran. Au programme : orecchiette (petites pâtes italiennes) avec de la saucisse, et lotte au citron confit avec sa puree d’asperges.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana accueille Heloïse Brion, creatrice de "Miss Maggies Kitchen

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: The Quercy region reveals architectural gems and enchanting landscapes. Rocamadour, a town clinging to its cliffs, Saint-Cirq-Lapopie, a picture-postcard village, and Castelnau-Bretenoux, a fairy-tale fortress, illustrate the richness of a land where tradition and history come together in perfect harmony.

programme.title: Big Little Footprints
programme.sub-title: Eco-Explore Your Backyard - California Coast To Santa Barbara
programme.desc: In this episode we remind viewers just how much you can find when exploring your own backyard by road tripping the California Coast to Santa Barbara! Swapping TV time to chats around the campfire and an exciting encounter with sea lions.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: To better understand the role of these explosive mountains located all over the world, on land or under the sea, Yann Arthus-Bertrand goes to Italy, the country with the most active volcanoes in Europe. Accompanied by volcano expert Jacques-Marie Bardintzeff, the photographer meets those people who have chosen to live with « their » volcano, in spite of the dangers involved in this kind of proximity.

programme.title: Tropical Home
programme.desc: For more than two decades, Japanese surfer Tsuyoshi Takahashi has played a role in championing the dreams of the Filipino surfers in La Union, Philippines. Upon deciding to call the town his home many years ago, he made it his mission to provide surfboards and share his knowledge and skills as an athlete with the local surfers. He also became instrumental in bringing them to international competitions and raising the Philippine flag on the global surfing stage. Tsuyoshi’s life story in La Union is a representation of how one can use his talent and passion to uplift the lives of others.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Create Your Calm: A Grounding Flow for Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Cultivate a sense of peace and stability with the Create Your Calm sequence. This restorative flow stays low to allow for a deeper connection to the earth and its grounding energy. Connect with your heart more completely and welcome a softer awareness with this gentle practice.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" offers a multisport session that combines several disciplines, from gymnastics and swimming to basketball. The session incorporates movements inspired by different sports, providing a varied and enjoyable workout. The exercises target both the lower and upper body while including movements that make for an effective cardio workout. With an energetic and friendly atmosphere, this fun session is perfect for getting active while having a good time.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: Sequence joyeuse et elegante, "Grace et Gratitude" ouvre l’avant du corps avec une serie d’extensions dynamiques vers l’arrière. Faites rayonner la lumière de votre cœur en apprenant à respirer avec ampleur. Cette pratique encourage une action guidee par des intentions d’amour, de pardon et de gratitude.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Its off to the start of the first week of competition. But before the four amateur decorators take their turn with paintbrushes and nails, they have a meeting in the Brussels workshop. To kick off this weeks competition, Armand, 33, is in the starting blocks. This young man from Montpellier is determined to prove that he is the ace decorator and no one else. Our competitor has the advantage of having a good dose of inspiration. And yes, as well as creating costumes, Armand has several great passions. This weeks theme is wood. Will our man from Montpellier succeed in keeping to this theme, which is full of pitfalls?

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to an intense and motivating cardio session. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a full warm-up, emphasizing the importance of preparing the body for an energetic workout. The program includes two standing movement exercises, followed by two on the floor, each performed in four sets of 40 seconds. The goal is to raise the heart rate and strengthen the muscles by alternating between intense efforts and floor exercises. The friendly and fun atmosphere makes this session perfect for training in a great mood while pushing your limits.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Tendre et savoureux, l’agneau tient une place preponderante dans la cuisine festive mais aussi dans celle de tous les jours. Du Pays Basque au Cotentin en passant par Paris, Julie part donc sur les routes de France à la decouverte des differentes races et types delevage existant à travers le pays. Il faut dire que la France a lune des productions les plus variees au monde. Il existe plus dune quarantaine de races repertoriees en 5 categories : precoces, d’herbage, rustiques, merinos et laitières. Mais plus qu’à la race, c’est à la façon dont ils sont alimentes qui interesse les fins connaisseurs. Julie nous fait decouvrir ses producteurs et cuisiniers de ce met raffine !

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Release and Restore: A Sequence for Your Spine
programme.desc: Release and Restore is a sequence that brings you full circle through a series of poses that create space for reflection. You will release tension in your spine while attuning to the changes even the smallest actions create. What change will you make today?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C’est à nouveau sur les routes de France que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Julie pour parler d’un produit incontournable des tables françaises : le fromage. Plus qu’un engouement gourmand, plus qu’une friandise de fins de repas, le fromage est associe à l’image de la gastronomie française, et d’ailleurs reconnu patrimoine immateriel par l’UNESCO. Les français ne s’y sont pas trompes : avec près de 1 000 varietes - des pâtes molles, aux pâtes cuites, persillees, ou encore pressees, et avec 45 Appellations, nous sommes les plus gros consommateurs de fromage au monde !

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: For the third day of competition, Nancy is in the starting blocks. The 50-year-old mother of seven hails from Canada. And when it comes to decorating, this Seneffe resident is not short of practice. The proof: Nancy runs an old post office as a guest house, which she has completely redecorated.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, were off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... Well then head to the cherry capital, Ceret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: The competition continues with Eric. At 49, this well-groomed Parisian describes himself as an original, but not only that. At least the competitors have been warned. For Eric, decorating is a real passion.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, lets discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine des pois chiches. Comme ils sont originaires du Moyen-Orient, elle decide de preparer des recettes libanaises. Au menu : fallafels avec des pois chiches, du kumquat, des epices, de la cannelle, et blettes aux pois chiches, persil, menthe et boulgour.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo met la Normandie à lhonneur ! Avec le president de la region, Herve Morin, elle prepare des pommes pochees dans un sirop de cannelle, ainsi que des moules... à sa façon.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: USA: The end of oil - Part 2
programme.desc: "The end of oil" is the amazing story of a raw material which has revolutionized mans life in just a century. But today, oil reserves are depleting. In his crazy race for always more production, Man didnt manage to preserve this precious energy that took million years for the Earth to give out. To tell the adventure of oil, Yann Arthus-Bertrand and his team went to the United States, the country which depends the most on black gold. At the start of the 21st century, it is now urgent to realize that oil resources are limited. Its today that we have to act and get organized, in order to prepare the new era to come. While all our economies are based on the petrol barrels price, well have to learn to do without oil within 20, 30 or 100 years. What will be the consequences? What are the solutions at stake? In Part-2, Yann Arthus-Bertrand continues to try to answer these questions. From China to Benin, including Azerbaijan, Belgium and Canada, Earth From Above takes us on a new.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas etre deçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Decouvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits preferes des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au meme titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Cote recettes, Julie fera decouvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous reserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien etre.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: We are in the middle of the harvest season, a perfect opportunity to discover the most beautiful French vineyards.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourdhui cest sur la route des champignons que Julie nous embarque. Rien de mieux pour occuper ses week-ends qu’une balade en foret à la recherche de champignons comestibles. Certaines espèces, comme le cèpe ou la girolle, se conservent très bien au congelateur ou, pour les plus patients, en bocaux. Nous aurons egalement loccasion de rencontrer deux Chefs passionnes par les champignons, devenus des specialistes du sujet : Franck Quinton et Regis Marcon. Mais pour l’instant on prend la route, à la decouverte de plats typiquement français avec d’etonnants champignons de Paris en Touraine, des morilles dans le Jura, des cèpes en Gironde, des russules charbonnières en Normandie et des coulemelles en Auvergne !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo offers a recipe for celeriac risotto with citrus powder. She will also prepare black rice with spring vegetables. A real treat for the taste buds!

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Discover an Italian culinary staple: ravioli. Luana Belmondo, accompanied by her son Alessandro, makes her recipe for ricotta arugula ravioli with artichoke and almond sauce. The duo also prepare choco ravioli stuffed with pistachio custard and strawberry coulis.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Quel bonheur de retrouver ce fruit printanier ! Les fraises redonnent des couleurs à nos assiettes et nous apportent une bonne dose de vitamines et d’antioxydants. Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo nous devoile deux recettes sucrees autour des fraises.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Pour les paresseux et tous ceux qui n’ont pas le temps, Luana Belmondo propose deux petites recettes simples et efficaces. Decouvrez son pain à lail et au fromage, et ses spaghettis à lail.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo met lavocat à lhonneur, ce fruit originaire du Mexique qui presente de nombreux bienfaits pour notre sante. Elle nous propose une recette de gambas à la puree de concombres et avocats, ainsi quune panna cotta à lavocat accompagnee de sa salade de fraises.

programme.title: Tropical Home
programme.desc: For more than two decades, Japanese surfer Tsuyoshi Takahashi has played a role in championing the dreams of the Filipino surfers in La Union, Philippines. Upon deciding to call the town his home many years ago, he made it his mission to provide surfboards and share his knowledge and skills as an athlete with the local surfers. programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Les aperos improvises, ce n’est pas toujours facile. Quand les amis debarquent sans prevenir, le stress peut vite monter. Pas de panique, Luana Belmondo et Thomas Clouet, grand specialiste en la matière, improvisent un apero au pied leve avec trois fois rien. Des macarons de champignons, un mini tartare de bœuf, et le tour est joue !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Wellness cuisine is not synonymous with sadness and insipidity. It can be extremely gourmet, for a balanced way to indulge yourself. On this theme, Luana welcomes young wellness pastry chef Johanna Le Pape. Together, they will prepare recipes that are both tasty and perfectly balanced: corn pizza with vegetables and peach-cassis and verbena puffs...

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Leftovers often end up in the garbage can. But with a little thought, its easy to recycle them. This ecological and economical gesture can even delight our taste buds. Like us, Luana Belmondo hates throwing things away. She knows all about waste-free cooking and has mastered the art. She shows us how to reinvent boiled or steamed potatoes as something other than mashed potatoes. On the program: potato souffle with paprika and vegetable gratin with curry.

programme.desc: I denne episoden ser vi på den utrolige tilpasningen og utfordringene til dyrene i en verden hvor det knapt finnes noe liv.

programme.title: Præriehundenes rike
programme.desc: Det er vinter i New Mexico. I Highlands forbereder Carl og ungene seg på å gå i hi, men en uvanlig allianse mellom noen farlige rovdyr har skapt en stor trussel for præriehundene.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: National Geographic blir med på en spennende reise over 445 kilometer for å utforske Grand Canyon og dens mysterier.

programme.title: USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Våren i nasjonalparkene over hele USA kommer med nytt liv. Men selv i de vernede områdene byr veien til foreldreskap på utfordringer. I Katmai våkner en bjørnebinne fra vinterdvalen med tre nye unger. Hun må spise nok til å gi ungene melk, samtidig som hun beskytter dem mot trusselen fra en hannbjørn som ønsker å stifte familie. I Everglades blir en rosenskjestork-unge flygeferdig for tidlig og må overleve blant mangroverøttene mens søsknene er høyt oppe i reiret. Mor og far må jobbe dobbelt så hardt for å sikre at alle ungene overlever. I Yellowstone nyter bisonkalvene godt av beskyttelsen fra flokken. Men er det nok når ulvene nærmer seg?

programme.title: Villmarkens utfordringer
programme.desc: Våren er i anmarsj, og dyr fra hele Sør-Atlanteren samler seg på Falklandsøyene.

programme.title: Villmarkens utfordringer
programme.desc: Hvert år forflytter flere generasjoner med monarksommerfugler seg fra Mexico til Canada og tilbake igjen.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er et frodig og mangfoldig kontinent. Fantastiske landskaper huser skapninger som har tilpasset seg til livet her. Det er ikke gitt at de overlever, for rovdyrene finnes overalt. Digre delfiner og det største kattedyret i Amerika er blant rovdyrene som lever i den ville naturen.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Dyrlegene hos Dyrefikserne redder en hund fra katastrofe, fjerner et rekordstort antall nyrestein fra en annen, og gir en vill skilpadde en ny sjanse – samtidig som de prøver å gå foran med et godt eksempel med klinikkens eget kjæledyr, katten Bear. Dyrlegene hjelper også en kanin av typen belgisk kjempe, en fargerik konur, en høne med et egg som sitter fast, og et par nydelige kattunger.

programme.title: USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Våren i nasjonalparkene over hele USA kommer med nytt liv. Men selv i de vernede områdene byr veien til foreldreskap på utfordringer. programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Dyrlegene hos Dyrefikserne redder en hund fra katastrofe, fjerner et rekordstort antall nyrestein fra en annen, og gir en vill skilpadde en ny sjanse – samtidig som de prøver å gå foran med et godt eksempel med klinikkens eget kjæledyr, katten Bear. programme.title: Dyrehagens hemmeligheter: Tampa
programme.desc: Feir verdens neshorndag sammen med neshornene i dyrehagen Tampa! Møt det indiske neshorn-paret, Jamie og Johnny, mens de takler livet sammen – fra kurtise og bursdager til trening, helsesjekker og til og med fødselen av deres første kalv. I Safari Africa trener dyrepasserne det sørlige hvite neshornet Kipenzi til en lang tur i tilhengeren, og tar deretter farvel når tiden er inne til at hun skal forlate dyrehagen Tampa for å stifte sin egen familie.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Den store julehøytiden er på vei, men alt er ikke like trivelig. Dr. Pol behandler hoven til et reinsdyr før han undersøker en forlatt hundevalp. Dr. Nicole rykker ut til en ku som har oppført seg rart, og dr. Lisa hjelper en katt som sliter med å puste.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Overraskelser kommer i alle former og størrelser. En nymfekakadu har et skjevt nebb og dr. Lisa undersøker en gårdskatts blærelekkasje. Når en chihuahua ankommer timer senere med et akutt øyeproblem, beholder legene fokuset. En alvorlig skjønnhetsfeil dukker opp på en konkurransehund, og en hes hest sliter med å puste. Alle samarbeider for å gjøre Dianes bursdag ekstra spesiell.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Ultralyd for en skjeggagam og sårbehandling for ei gås – listen over ting som må gjøres, tar aldri slutt. Dr. Lisa har to valpekriser på rad. Dr. Pol og dr. Brenda rykker ut sammen på gårdsbesøk, og dr. Nicole steller med en løskatt. Mens staben på klinikken tar seg av driften, eskorterer dr. Pol stolt veteraner til Washington, DC.

programme.title: Thailands ville side
programme.desc: Over hele Thailand er dyrene på konstant leting etter mat. I tillegg utkjempes det en evig kamp for å finne byttedyr eller unngå å bli tatt.

programme.title: Thailands ville side
programme.desc: Behovet for å pare seg driver alt liv i Thailand, og dyrene presses til bristepunktet i jakten på en partner og familie.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er et frodig og mangfoldig kontinent. Fantastiske landskaper huser skapninger som har tilpasset seg til livet her. Det er ikke gitt at de overlever, for rovdyrene finnes overalt. Digre delfiner og det største kattedyret i Amerika er blant rovdyrene som lever i den ville naturen.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er et kontinent med ekstreme variasjoner, der man finner flere hundre tusen kvadratkilometer med skog, sletter og fjell. Det er tøft å overleve her. Noen dyr har utviklet seg til å bli veldig store eller svært små, og begge strategiene skal øke sjansen for å overleve.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er fullt av det ekstreme. Enorme områder med skog, sletter og fjell. Det er lettere sagt enn gjort å overleve. Men når det blir vanskelig, forvandler de ville beboerne seg til særinger. Flere tusen år med merkelig evolusjon har gjort dette enorme kontinentet til mutantenes land. Forvent det uventede, for her er det underlige normalt.

programme.title: Utemmede Sør-Amerika
programme.desc: Historien om livet på en knivsegg i den enorme fjellkjeden som strekker seg gjennom hele Sør-Amerika.

programme.title: Jaguar: Jungle Icon of Guyana
programme.desc: En ung jaguar skal til å dra ut på sitt aller viktigste oppdrag i livet: å finne sitt eget kongerike. Reisen tar ham gjennom varierte habitater, som alle har sitt eget utvalg av dyr. Det er kun om han kan bevise sin verdi at han kan ta tronen i et av de aller siste ville paradisene i verden.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er fullt av det ekstreme. Enorme områder med skog, sletter og fjell. Det er lettere sagt enn gjort å overleve. Men når det blir vanskelig, forvandler de ville beboerne seg til særinger. Flere tusen år med merkelig evolusjon har gjort dette enorme kontinentet til mutantenes land. Forvent det uventede, for her er det underlige normalt.

programme.title: Utemmede Sør-Amerika
programme.desc: Historien om livet på en knivsegg i den enorme fjellkjeden som strekker seg gjennom hele Sør-Amerika.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Den store julehøytiden er på vei, men alt er ikke like trivelig. Dr. Pol behandler hoven til et reinsdyr før han undersøker en forlatt hundevalp. Dr. Nicole rykker ut til en ku som har oppført seg rart, og dr. Lisa hjelper en katt som sliter med å puste.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Overraskelser kommer i alle former og størrelser. En nymfekakadu har et skjevt nebb og dr. Lisa undersøker en gårdskatts blærelekkasje. Når en chihuahua ankommer timer senere med et akutt øyeproblem, beholder legene fokuset. En alvorlig skjønnhetsfeil dukker opp på en konkurransehund, og en hes hest sliter med å puste. Alle samarbeider for å gjøre Dianes bursdag ekstra spesiell.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Ultralyd for en skjeggagam og sårbehandling for ei gås – listen over ting som må gjøres, tar aldri slutt. Dr. Lisa har to valpekriser på rad. Dr. Pol og dr. Brenda rykker ut sammen på gårdsbesøk, og dr. Nicole steller med en løskatt. Mens staben på klinikken tar seg av driften, eskorterer dr. Pol stolt veteraner til Washington, DC.

programme.title: Utemmede Sør-Amerika
programme.desc: Historien om livet på en knivsegg i den enorme fjellkjeden som strekker seg gjennom hele Sør-Amerika.

programme.title: Thailands ville side
programme.desc: Behovet for å pare seg driver alt liv i Thailand, og dyrene presses til bristepunktet i jakten på en partner og familie.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er et frodig og mangfoldig kontinent. Fantastiske landskaper huser skapninger som har tilpasset seg til livet her. Det er ikke gitt at de overlever, for rovdyrene finnes overalt. Digre delfiner og det største kattedyret i Amerika er blant rovdyrene som lever i den ville naturen.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er et kontinent med ekstreme variasjoner, der man finner flere hundre tusen kvadratkilometer med skog, sletter og fjell. Det er tøft å overleve her. Noen dyr har utviklet seg til å bli veldig store eller svært små, og begge strategiene skal øke sjansen for å overleve.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er fullt av det ekstreme. Enorme områder med skog, sletter og fjell. Det er lettere sagt enn gjort å overleve. programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er et frodig og mangfoldig kontinent. Fantastiske landskaper huser skapninger som har tilpasset seg til livet her. Det er ikke gitt at de overlever, for rovdyrene finnes overalt. Digre delfiner og det største kattedyret i Amerika er blant rovdyrene som lever i den ville naturen.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Dyrlegene hos Dyrefikserne redder en hund fra katastrofe, fjerner et rekordstort antall nyrestein fra en annen, og gir en vill skilpadde en ny sjanse – samtidig som de prøver å gå foran med et godt eksempel med klinikkens eget kjæledyr, katten Bear. Dyrlegene hjelper også en kanin av typen belgisk kjempe, en fargerik konur, en høne med et egg som sitter fast, og et par nydelige kattunger.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er et kontinent med ekstreme variasjoner, der man finner flere hundre tusen kvadratkilometer med skog, sletter og fjell. Det er tøft å overleve her. Noen dyr har utviklet seg til å bli veldig store eller svært små, og begge strategiene skal øke sjansen for å overleve.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: Sør-Amerika er et frodig og mangfoldig kontinent. Fantastiske landskaper huser skapninger som har tilpasset seg til livet her. Det er ikke gitt at de overlever, for rovdyrene finnes overalt. Digre delfiner og det største kattedyret i Amerika er blant rovdyrene som lever i den ville naturen.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Leoparden Saba er et overlegent rovdyr, men hennes styrke og kraft vil settes på prøve idet hun må oppdra to unger.

programme.title: Villmarkens utfordringer
programme.desc: På slettene i Serengeti stopper en million gnuer opp så hunnene kan føde unger i en massiv sammenkomst.

programme.title: Villmarkens utfordringer
programme.desc: Når man har alt, hvorfor skulle man gi slipp på det? En forventer at dyr velger den enkleste og sikreste måten for å sikre seg mat, trygghet og ly.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Hyenedronningen Zalika vil ta hevn på løvene som holder klanen hennes i eksil. Hun samler en hær for å ta et endelig oppgjør med løveflokken.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: I Sør-Afrikas villmark blir dyrene desperate i de tørre vintermånedene. Sultne krokodiller sloss mot en farlig gruppe flodhester, flodhestene prøver seg på en gruppe hannløver, en honninggrevling kjemper for livet mot leoparder, og villhunder skaper komplett kaos hvor enn de går.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Leoparden Saba er et overlegent rovdyr, men hennes styrke og kraft vil settes på prøve idet hun må oppdra to unger.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Hyenedronningen Zalika vil ta hevn på løvene som holder klanen hennes i eksil. Hun samler en hær for å ta et endelig oppgjør med løveflokken.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: I Sør-Afrikas villmark blir dyrene desperate i de tørre vintermånedene. Sultne krokodiller sloss mot en farlig gruppe flodhester, flodhestene prøver seg på en gruppe hannløver, en honninggrevling kjemper for livet mot leoparder, og villhunder skaper komplett kaos hvor enn de går.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Når savannen blir en slagmark ser vi på fra sidelinjen når en leopard blir trengt opp i et hjørne av en løveflokk. En ung impala blir kastet opp i luften av en flodhest, to hyener prøver å drukne hverandre og et jordsvin står ansikt til ansikt med en brunhyene.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Livet i den afrikanske bushen er et strategispill for å overleve for de som bor der. Men det mødrene som viser eksepsjonelt mot når det gjelder å beskytte sine små. De frodige gresslettene byr på gjemmesteder for babyene men også perfekt kamuflasje for luskende rovdyr. Vi ser på de utrolige måtene disse modige matriarkene forer, forsvarer og oppdrar sine barn.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Leoparden Saba er et overlegent rovdyr, men hennes styrke og kraft vil settes på prøve idet hun må oppdra to unger.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: En liten, lojal familie av ville hunder kalt Pale Pack er på flukt fra sine rivaler i Savage Kingdom. Mens de kjemper for å overleve og holde sine nyfødte valper trygge, oppdager de at de er mindre og i mindretall.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt forvist til utkanten av Savage Kingdom av Marsh Pride, kjemper de tre løvinnene fra Northern Pride for å gjenoppbygge sin en gang mektige familie. Selv om det er vanskelig, forbereder flokken sin hevn og tar tilbake makten.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Dronning Matsumi fra den mektige Marsh Pride har besteget tronen og forbereder sin flokk for krig. Som en uovertruffen jeger, må hun bevise seg som leder av dynastiet. Sammen med kongen Sekekama, må flokken forsvare deres makt mot arvingskonkurrenter når de innkommer deres territorium.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Hyenedronningen Zalika vil ta hevn på løvene som holder klanen hennes i eksil. Hun samler en hær for å ta et endelig oppgjør med løveflokken.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Alt føler som om det henger sammen når veterinærene ser mønstre i sakene sine. De behandler australian shepherds, bølger av dyr med pusteproblemer, og en rekke klumper og kuler som holder teamet travle. Selv om symptomene, rasene og navnene kan synes like, er ingen saker virkelig den samme.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol rykker ut til en gård etter et nødanrop, mens en stor snøstorm rammer det sentrale Michigan.

programme.title: Dyrehagens hemmeligheter: Tampa
programme.desc: Feir den internasjonale primatdagen sammen med orangutangene, bavianene, kolobusapene og siamangene i dyrehagen Tampa. Stålsett deg til en bedårende opplevelse når en babyorangutang oppdager gleden ved bobler, og hei på de nye bavianene når de utforsker habitatet sitt. Senere setter dyrepasserne siamangenes intelligens på prøve med et aktivitetsspill med mat og en kolobusape får en helsesjekk. Karismatisk, sjarmerende og fengslende å se på – denne spesielle episoden er morsommere enn en hel flokk aper.

programme.title: Dyrehagens hemmeligheter: Tampa
programme.desc: Feir verdens neshorndag sammen med neshornene i dyrehagen Tampa! Møt det indiske neshorn-paret, Jamie og Johnny, mens de takler livet sammen – fra kurtise og bursdager til trening, helsesjekker og til og med fødselen av deres første kalv. I Safari Africa trener dyrepasserne det sørlige hvite neshornet Kipenzi til en lang tur i tilhengeren, og tar deretter farvel når tiden er inne til at hun skal forlate dyrehagen Tampa for å stifte sin egen familie.

programme.title: Villdyrenes rike
programme.desc: Hyenedronningen Zalika vil ta hevn på løvene som holder klanen hennes i eksil. Hun samler en hær for å ta et endelig oppgjør med løveflokken.
